title: Kekec
writer: Joze Gale, Frane Milcinski, Josip Vandot
actors: Matija Barl, Frane Milcinski, Franc Presetnik
plot: In an alpine valley lies an idyllic village. High up in the mountains, facing each others across live two men: a "good grandpa" and an "evil man". The first is herbe picker Kosobirin, the other Bedanec is a poacher. The latter has...
